description: This file implements an AWS Lambda function using the AWS Lambda Powertools library to handle user management operations via API Gateway. It defines REST API endpoints for creating, retrieving, updating, enabling, disabling, and deleting users, utilizing an external identity provider object factory and logging/tracing utilities.

methods.name: create_user
methods.description: Handles POST request to create a new user by calling the identity provider service.

methods.name: get_users
methods.description: Handles GET request to retrieve all users.

methods.name: get_user
methods.description: Handles GET request to retrieve a specific user by username.

methods.name: update_user
methods.description: Handles PUT request to update user details.

methods.name: disable_user
methods.description: Handles DELETE request to disable a user.

methods.name: enable_user
methods.description: Handles PUT request to enable a user.

methods.name: delete_user
methods.description: Handles DELETE request to delete a user.

methods.name: lambda_handler
methods.description: Main entry point for the AWS Lambda function, resolving API Gateway events.
